The Invitation

A
Heartfelt
Welcome

ॐ श्री गणेशाय नमः

Dr.Pavan Kumar R
& Manasa M Naik

With the blessings of our beloved parents, elders, and well-wishers, we are delighted to announce the joyous union of Dr. Pavan Kumar R and Manasa M Naik. What began as a beautiful journey of love, understanding, and companionship has now blossomed into a lifelong commitment.

As they step into this sacred bond of marriage, we warmly invite you to be a part of this auspicious occasion and grace the celebration with your presence.

The auspicious wedding ceremony will take place on 4th May 2026 at 9:30 AM, at Shivashakthi Conventional Hall, Shiralakoppa, Shimoga. The celebrations begin on 30th April with the Chappra ceremony, 1st May: Chappra Pooje, Akkishastra & Mehendi. 2nd May: Haldi Shaastra & Sangeetha Night. 3rd May: Reception (7:00 PM onwards). The day will be filled with traditional rituals, heartfelt moments, and joyous celebrations.

Your presence, love, and blessings will make this special day even more memorable. We eagerly look forward to celebrating this beautiful occasion with you and creating cherished memories that will last a lifetime.

With love & blessings from Bride's Parents Late Maruthi Naik T Govt. Head Master & Saraswathi Bai Asst. Govt. Teacher
Groom's Parents Ravikumar Retired Deputy Commissioner & Annapurna
Two souls, one journey,
a lifetime of love.
04 May 2026 · Shiralakoppa, Shimoga
